-- Swiss Affaire product catalog seed.
-- Idempotent product/category/unit seed generated by scripts/seed-swiss-affaire-products.js.
-- Product images are stored in Supabase S3 object storage and DB rows point only to those S3 URLs.
-- bread: https://www.pexels.com/photo/loaf-of-bread-10075983/
-- buns: https://www.pexels.com/photo/burger-buns-with-sesame-seeds-9673517/
-- flatbread: https://www.pexels.com/photo/flat-bread-in-kitchen-20607941/
-- garlic: https://www.pexels.com/photo/close-up-of-freshly-baked-garlic-bread-loaves-37043987/
-- baguette: https://www.pexels.com/photo/close-up-photo-of-baguettes-11953880/
-- focaccia: https://www.pexels.com/photo/freshly-baked-focaccia-with-vibrant-toppings-32944459/
-- croissant: https://www.pexels.com/photo/croissants-in-a-bakery-18058319/
-- muffin: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1607958996333-41aef7caefaa
-- cupcake: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1486427944299-d1955d23e34d
-- tart: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1464305795204-6f5bbfc7fb81
-- brownie: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1606313564200-e75d5e30476c
-- doughnut: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551024601-bec78aea704b
-- cookies: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1499636136210-6f4ee915583e
-- savory: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1601050690597-df0568f70950
-- pizza: https://www.pexels.com/photo/pizza-dough-20281829/

WITH unit_data AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM jsonb_to_recordset($json$[
  {
    "code": "loaf",
    "display_name": "Loaf",
    "symbol": "loaf",
    "allows_fractional": false,
    "decimal_precision": 0
  },
  {
    "code": "piece",
    "display_name": "Piece",
    "symbol": "pc",
    "allows_fractional": false,
    "decimal_precision": 0
  },
  {
    "code": "pkt_4pcs",
    "display_name": "Packet of 4 pieces",
    "symbol": "pkt (4pcs)",
    "allows_fractional": false,
    "decimal_precision": 0
  },
  {
    "code": "pkt_5pcs",
    "display_name": "Packet of 5 pieces",
    "symbol": "pkt (5pcs)",
    "allows_fractional": false,
    "decimal_precision": 0
  },
  {
    "code": "kilogram",
    "display_name": "Kilogram",
    "symbol": "kg",
    "allows_fractional": true,
    "decimal_precision": 3
  }
]$json$::jsonb)
        AS x(code text, display_name text, symbol text, allows_fractional boolean, decimal_precision smallint)
)
INSERT INTO measurement_units (code, display_name, symbol, allows_fractional, decimal_precision, is_active)
SELECT code, display_name, symbol, allows_fractional, decimal_precision, true
FROM unit_data
ON CONFLICT (code) DO UPDATE
SET display_name = EXCLUDED.display_name,
    symbol = EXCLUDED.symbol,
    allows_fractional = EXCLUDED.allows_fractional,
    decimal_precision = EXCLUDED.decimal_precision,
    is_active = true;

WITH category_data AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM jsonb_to_recordset($json$[
  {
    "name": "Breads",
    "slug": "breads",
    "short_description": "Fresh sandwich, jumbo, white, brown, multigrain, and sourdough breads.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/bread.jpg",
    "display_order": 10
  },
  {
    "name": "Buns & Pav",
    "slug": "buns-pav",
    "short_description": "Burger buns, sliders, ladi pav, and pav packs.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/buns.jpg",
    "display_order": 20
  },
  {
    "name": "Kulcha & Flatbreads",
    "slug": "kulcha-flatbreads",
    "short_description": "Kulcha, taco, pita, tortilla, and flatbread formats.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/flatbread.jpg",
    "display_order": 30
  },
  {
    "name": "Garlic Breads",
    "slug": "garlic-breads",
    "short_description": "Garlic loaf, garlic rounds, bread sticks, and herb breads.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/garlic.jpg",
    "display_order": 40
  },
  {
    "name": "Focaccia & Pizza Bases",
    "slug": "focaccia-pizza-bases",
    "short_description": "Focaccia and pizza bases for kitchen service.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/focaccia.jpg",
    "display_order": 50
  },
  {
    "name": "Croissants & Viennoiserie",
    "slug": "croissants-viennoiserie",
    "short_description": "Croissants, Danish, cream roll shells, and viennoiserie.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/croissant.jpg",
    "display_order": 60
  },
  {
    "name": "Muffins & Cupcakes",
    "slug": "muffins-cupcakes",
    "short_description": "Muffins and single-serve cupcakes.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/cupcake.jpg",
    "display_order": 70
  },
  {
    "name": "Tarts, Mousse & Desserts",
    "slug": "tarts-mousse-desserts",
    "short_description": "Choco lava, tarts, mousse, and plated dessert components.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/tart.jpg",
    "display_order": 80
  },
  {
    "name": "Brownies",
    "slug": "brownies",
    "short_description": "Brownie pieces, slabs, and crush.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/brownie.jpg",
    "display_order": 90
  },
  {
    "name": "Doughnuts & Bagels",
    "slug": "doughnuts-bagels",
    "short_description": "Glazed doughnuts and bagels.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/doughnut.jpg",
    "display_order": 100
  },
  {
    "name": "Cookies & Savory Crisps",
    "slug": "cookies-savory-crisps",
    "short_description": "Cookies, biscotti, soup sticks, lavash, and crisp bakery sides.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/cookies.jpg",
    "display_order": 110
  },
  {
    "name": "Puffs & Savory Bakes",
    "slug": "puffs-savory-bakes",
    "short_description": "Puffs, baked samosa, and vol-au-vent shells.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/savory.jpg",
    "display_order": 120
  },
  {
    "name": "Rolls & Sandwich Bases",
    "slug": "rolls-sandwich-bases",
    "short_description": "Hotdog rolls, panini, subrolls, and dinner rolls.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/buns.jpg",
    "display_order": 130
  },
  {
    "name": "Dry Cakes",
    "slug": "dry-cakes",
    "short_description": "Tea-time dry cakes in loaf format.",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/muffin.jpg",
    "display_order": 140
  }
]$json$::jsonb)
        AS x(name text, slug text, short_description text, image_url text, display_order integer)
)
INSERT INTO product_categories (name, slug, short_description, image_url, display_order, status)
SELECT name, slug, short_description, image_url, display_order, 'show'
FROM category_data
ON CONFLICT (slug) DO UPDATE
SET name = EXCLUDED.name,
    short_description = EXCLUDED.short_description,
    image_url = EXCLUDED.image_url,
    display_order = EXCLUDED.display_order,
    status = 'show';

    SELECT *
    FROM jsonb_to_recordset($json$[

    "name": "Sourdough Bread",
    "slug": "sourdough-bread",
    "sku": "SA-032",
    "category_slug": "breads",
    "unit_code": "loaf",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/bread.jpg",

    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/savory.jpg",
    "price": 25,
    "short_description": "Baked Samosa (per pc)",
    "display_order": 83
  },
  {
    "name": "Vol-au-vent",
    "slug": "vol-au-vent",
    "sku": "SA-084",
    "category_slug": "puffs-savory-bakes",
    "unit_code": "piece",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/savory.jpg",
    "price": 22,
    "short_description": "Vol-au-vent (per pc)",
    "display_order": 84
  },
  {
    "name": "Croissant 8''",
    "slug": "croissant-8",
    "sku": "SA-085",
    "category_slug": "croissants-viennoiserie",
    "unit_code": "piece",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/croissant.jpg",
    "price": 90,
    "short_description": "Croissant 8'' (per pc)",
    "display_order": 85
  },
  {
    "name": "Subroll 8''",
    "slug": "subroll-8",
    "sku": "SA-086",
    "category_slug": "rolls-sandwich-bases",
    "unit_code": "piece",
    "image_url": "https://jqaffigxzprtorxlgyvt.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/catalog/swiss-affaire/buns.jpg",
    "price": 25,
    "short_description": "Subroll 8'' (per pc)",
    "display_order": 86
  }
]$json$::jsonb)
        AS x(name text, slug text, sku text, category_slug text, unit_code text, image_url text, price numeric, short_description text, display_order integer)
)
INSERT INTO products (
    name, slug, sku, category_id, unit_id, image_url, price,
    short_description, status, display_order
)
SELECT
    pd.name,
    pd.slug,
    pd.sku,
    pc.id,
    mu.id,
    pd.image_url,
    pd.price,
    pd.short_description,
    'show',
    pd.display_order
FROM product_data pd
JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.slug = pd.category_slug
JOIN measurement_units mu ON mu.code = pd.unit_code
ON CONFLICT (slug) DO UPDATE
SET sku = EXCLUDED.sku,
    category_id = EXCLUDED.category_id,
    unit_id = EXCLUDED.unit_id,
    image_url = EXCLUDED.image_url,
    price = EXCLUDED.price,
    short_description = EXCLUDED.short_description,
    status = 'show',
    display_order = EXCLUDED.display_order;
